title: Seselinia elata
taxonomy: Seselinia elata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is a member of the genus Seselinia, which is a group of plants closely related to the genus Seseli. Seselinia elata is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. The classification of Seselinia elata is further supported by its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf shape and flower structure. As a member of the Apiaceae family, Seselinia elata is related to other plants commonly known as carrots, parsley, and dill.
